prompt: Create a painterly high-fashion portrait of a single elegant woman representing the winter emerald mood palette. Vertical 3:4 canvas, waist-to-knee crop, dramatic studio lighting. The woman stands in a graceful contrapposto pose with one hand resting on her waist, wearing a flowing deep emerald green couture gown with a plunging V neckline, wrapped bodice, layered drapery, long translucent chiffon sleeves, and subtle gold highlights in the folds. Her dark teal-black hair is shoulder length, glossy, and wind-swept to one side. Place her in front of an abstract impasto oil-paint background made of broad palette-knife strokes in teal, forest green, dark blue, olive, charcoal, and small ochre accents. The overall mood should be moody, luxurious, artistic, and editorial, blending photorealistic fashion photography with visible painterly texture. Keep exactly one human figure, no text, no logos, no jewelry emphasis, no extra props, and leave the face softly obscured or featureless so the focus is on silhouette, garment, color palette, and brushwork.
